name: Cube Zones Texture GL
description: XR_DXR_display_zones PARITY TEST (ADR-027), macOS OpenGL texture-class leg driving the GL native-compositor IOSurface zones path: same two-3D-zone + Local2D-strip + wish-mask submission as the Metal leg, but the app binds a shared IOSurface via XR_DXR_macos_gl_binding + cocoa-binding and presents it itself through OpenGL — proving a GL texture app receives the full multi-zone composite written back into its shared surface (M=wish mode, O=overlap toggle).
